texts.name: Mirthanë
texts.biography: Mirthanë is a rare bridge between grace and might, leading sacred priestesses and mighty giants with equal confidence. Her presence brings harmony to forces almost impossible to unite: priestesses act with greater precision, while giants unexpectedly gain swiftness. With every season, her bond with these ancient allies grows stronger.

specialty.description:
{Mountain Giants and Ancient Giants}

Increases the Speed of Mountain Giants and Ancient Giants by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 7 hero levels (rounded up).
specialty.name: Mountain Giants
